overall.description: Game footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked player character leaving a dark gothic interior hall containing a Site of Grace, passing through a stone corridor, and emerging into a vast open arena beneath a massive white tree. The character walks through shallow water filled with white flowers toward a gigantic red blooming flower structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral interior with Site of Grace

events.description: character rises from resting at the glowing red Site of Grace
character begins walking toward the dark corridor exit

agents.ego_description: character in dark cloak stands up from the spectral bonfire and begins walking through the candlelit hall

entered.detail: tall stone pillars supporting pointed arch ceilings
glowing red spectral bonfire with floating embers on the ground
wall-mounted iron candle holders with multiple lit flames
large ornate windows with intricate dark frames

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark gothic interior hall illuminated by candlelight. The player character rises from a glowing red Site of Grace and begins walking through the stone hall toward the exit, passing tall pillars and ornate windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor leading to exterior archway

events.description: approaching bright daylight visible through the arched exit ahead

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through the dimly lit stone hallway toward the bright archway exit

entered.detail: large stone archway glowing with bright exterior light
ornate stone columns lining the sides of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor flanked by columns, heading toward a brightly lit archway. The interior candlelight fades as the exit approaches, transitioning from the dark hall to the light outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open arena beneath the Haligtree with shallow water

events.description: character exits the corridor into the massive open arena revealing the sky
the gigantic red flower and massive white tree become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: character emerges from the dark corridor into the vast open area and continues walking through shallow water toward the massive red structure

entered.detail: massive white tree with sprawling branches filling the entire sky
enormous glowing red flower structure floating in the distance
flooded ground covered with floating white flower petals
the stone exit archway now behind the character

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a breathtaking vast open arena beneath a massive white tree that fills the sky. The ground is covered in shallow water with white flowers, and a gigantic red blooming flower structure is visible in the distance. The character begins the long walk toward it.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded meadow approaching the giant red bloom

events.description: character continues steady approach as the red flower grows significantly larger in frame

agents.ego_description: character wades through the shallow water filled with white flowers, steadily approaching the massive red bloom which dominates more of the view

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff formations surrounding the arena edges

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the shallow water toward the red flower, which grows increasingly massive in the frame. The white tree remains visible overhead, and rocky cliffs become visible on the right side of the arena.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of the giant red flower with massive tree roots

events.description: character begins circling around the base of the red flower structure
camera angle shifts to reveal the massive gnarled tree roots behind the flower

agents.ego_description: character walks around the base of the gigantic red flower, examining the structure from different angles as the massive tree roots become visible in the background

entered.detail: enormous gnarled white roots of the Haligtree twisting across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the massive red flower and begins circling it. The camera reveals the enormous scale of the white tree roots in the background, while the red petals fill the left side of the frame. The shallow water continues to cover the ground densely packed with white flowers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, gothic interior into a luminous, surreal open-air arena. It begins in a dark hall illuminated by candlelight, where the player character rises from a glowing red Site of Grace and walks past ornate windows and tall pillars. As the character moves through a narrow stone corridor, the interior shadows fade, transitioning through a brightly lit archway that opens into a breathtaking expanse beneath a massive white tree. The scene then expands across shallow water filled with white flowers, following the character on a long trek toward a gigantic red blooming flower structure as rocky cliffs emerge on the right. Finally, the camera reaches the base of the red flower and begins to circle it, revealing the enormous scale of the white tree roots in the background while red petals fill the frame.
